actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Police have launched a murder investigation after a man was found dead in woodland near Harling.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Diego Costa has admitted he could leave Chelsea this summer if the club receive a bid of £70m.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: The pilot of a military helicopter that crashed in Hampshire has been named as Captain Mike Green.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Port Vale have signed Newcastle United defender Remie Streete on loan.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: A man has been remanded in custody after appearing in court charged with causing serious injury by dangerous driving.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: A man has appeared in court charged with attempted murder and wilful fire-raising over a fire in a block of flats in Fraserburgh in 1998.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: The Jersey Triathlon team has been announced for the Gotland Island Games.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: A 16-year-old boy has died after a crash involving a white Volkswagen Golf on the B9010 Forres to Kellas Road.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Robert Lewandowski scored twice as Bayern Munich reached the DFB Pokal semi-finals with a 4-0 win over Borussia Dortmund.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Barnsley have signed defender Adam Davies on loan from Derby County until January.
